dj_text: The vibe goblin ate Jokeren - Kun os to feat. Pauline (Official Music Video). To appease it, we must sacrifice Kasper Nyemann - Københavns Brunette.
commercial_text: This is a test of the Emergency Radio System. If this were an actual emergency, you'd hear me screaming. It's not.
recovery_text: They're on our frequency AGAIN. We're changing the dimensional locks.
title: Kasper Nyemann - Københavns Brunette
